articles.title: Grayscale Did Not Unload 9 Million XRP Amidst Ongoing Ripple Lawsuit
articles.description: Grayscale Investments LLC has dumped more than 9 million XRP following the bombshell lawsuit brought against parent company Ripple by the SEC.
